name: Set of 2 Anise Dining Chair Natural Oak/Green Tea - Christopher Knight Home: Upholstered, Rubberwood Frame, Polyester
description: These stylish Christopher Knight Home Anise Dining Chairs are great for any table. with their tasteful rubberwood frame with a natural finish and upholstered seats these chairs become the quiet staple that everyone will be asking about. with its simple and sleek design these chairs a great addition to your dining table or any room where extra seating is required. These Christopher Knight Home Anise Dining Chairs are a perfect purchase, stock up while you can!
